name: vr-q-c-hk
description: Independent VR.q-c.hk three-dimensional scan web, API, and iOS scanner workspace.

scripts.build: npm run build -w @vrqc/shared && npm run build -w @vrqc/api && npm run build -w @vrqc/web
scripts.build:web: npm run build -w @vrqc/shared && npm run build -w @vrqc/web
scripts.build:api: npm run build -w @vrqc/shared && npm run build -w @vrqc/api
